metaData.Key Information: • Perfectly crafted hot and spicy potato chips to tickle your bite!

product.name: Calbee Crispy Potato Chips - Hot & Spicy

metaData.Ingredients:
Potato, Vegetable Oil, Sugar, Flavour Enhancers (E621, E635), Seaweed, Salt, Starch, Lactose, Soya Sauce Powder, Flavour, Maltodextrin, Hydrolysed Vegetable Protein, Spices, Anti-Caking Agent (E551), Sweetener (E951), Vitamin C, Emulsifier (E473)
• Contains gluten, soya bean and milk products
• Produced in a factory where crustacean, egg, fish, peanut, and nut products are also handled

• Produced in a factory where gluten, crustacean, egg, fish, peanut, soya bean, milk and nut products are also handled
metaData.Key Information: • Baked not fried, these addictive potato snacks go well with everything

product.description:
Awaken your taste buds with Hot & Spicy flavoured potato chips to get you fired up for the day.

- Perfectly seasoned from edge to edge, for full goodness in each bite
- Everyone's favourite stackable potato chips that are kept unbroken and sealed air-tight with a freshness that pops!
- Easy, portable cans for on-the-go snacking moments
- Non-greasy recipe for a cleaner and lighter snacking experience
- Versatile for dipping, stacking, or unleashing creative snacking adventures
- An iconic snacking companion, Pringles is trusted by snack enthusiasts worldwide

metaData.Ingredients:
Dried Potato, Palm Olein Oil, Corn Flour, Starch, Hot & Spicy Seasoning [Sugar, Salt, Maltodextrin, Flavour Enhancers (Monosodium L-Glutamate, Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides), Red Pepper, Glucose, Anti-Caking Agents (Tricalcium Phosphate, Silicon Dioxide, Onion, Garlic, Natural and Artificial Flavour, Acidity Regulators (Citric Acid, Trisodium Citrate), Emulsifier (Acacia Gum), Colour (Paprika Extract), Sweetener (Aspartame)], Emulsifier (Mono- and Diglycerides Of Fatty Acids), Maltodextrin, Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid)
- This Product Contains Food Allergen: Cereals Containing Gluten and Their Products Thereof
metaData.Key Information:
Are you a snack lover looking for the perfect potato chip snack to add a burst of flavours to your day? Craving a certain food? Feeling a certain mood? We've got it in a can of Pringles. Take your pick from an array of flavours across different cuisines. Even better, stack 'em up to innovate your own flavour combo!

Pop a can to add some crunch to lunch sandwich, indulge in a midnight munch with your favourite drink, stay energized as you game - grease-free pack it in a picnic or bring it for your barbecues, it's always more fun with Pringles. ONCE YOU POP, THE FUN DON'T STOP!

Pringles Hot & Spicy are like a thrilling joy ride of flavours where everyone wants to go for a second ride. But they can't because there are other people in line. And they're hungry. So wait your turn with 'em.
metaData.Storage Information: Always store in a cool, dry location; Store in a sealed container for best storage results

product.name: Pringles Potato Crisps - Hot & Spicy

metaData.Key Information: • Lightly salted flavour bringing out the rich taste of potatoes
• Perfectly crafted hot and spicy potato chips to tickle your bite!
metaData.SAP Product Name: CALBEE BIG BAG POTATO CHIPS HOT&SPICY 180G

product.name: Calbee Big Bag Potato Chips - Hot & Spicy

metaData.Key Information: • Crispy, delicious and full of the irresistible prawn taste

product.description: Twisties Chipster have been a catalyst for fun for over 30 years. Twisties Chipster are a perfect corn-based snack which are totally healthy as these are baked instead of fried these crunchy chips are available in 4 mouth watering-flavours - Sour cream and onion, Original, Hot and Spicy, Flaming BBQ. These flavours make the snacks irresistibly delicious. All the flavours are carefully selected to excite the pallets of the taste buds and cravings of its customers. It is highly energetic fun and exciting brand that has always been at the forefront to excite its consumers with its great and exciting activities and promotions that are superbly awesome. A perfect snack on the go.

metaData.Ingredients:
Potato, Vegetable Oil (Palm), Sugar, Salt, Spices and Natural Colouring [Paprika Extract (E160C)], contains permitted Flavouring Substance (Wheat and Soya), contains Monosodium Glutamate (E621) and Disodium 5'-Guanylate (E627) and Disodium 5'-Inosinate (E631) as permitted Flavour Enhancers
• Allergen Information: contains wheat and soya
• Manufactured on equipment that also processes products containing shrimp and milk
• Food additives are sourced from plant and synthetic origin
metaData.Key Information:
• Excite your taste buds with the hot and spicy flavour of Twisties Chipster potato chips
• Thin slices of potato chips for a big burst of taste with exciting flavours
• Irresistible and super delicious potato chips that nothing else matters
• Crispy Chipster Potato Chips by Twisties delivers crispy chips with whole lot of personality
metaData.SAP Product Name: TWISTIES CHIPSTER POTATO CHIPS - HOT & SPICY 130G

product.name: Twisties Chipster Potato Chips - Hot & Spicy

metaData.Key Information:
• Calbee Crispy Potato (Sour Cream) delivers great texture
• With an immense depth to the classic Sour Cream & Onion flavour
metaData.SAP Product Name: CALBEE CRISPY SOUR CREAM POTATO CHIPS 72G

product.name: Calbee Crispy Potato Chips - Sour Cream

metaData.Ingredients: Whole Stoneground Corn Treated with Lime, Vegetable Palm Oil, Water, Hot and Spicy Flavour Seasoning (Sugar, Salt, Chili Powder, Garlic Powder, Maltodextrin, Onion Powder, Yeast Extract, Spices, Sichuan Pepper Powder, Tricalcium Orthophosphate, Disodium-5'-Ribnucleotide, Flavour, Paprika Oleoresin), Carotene (Vegetable)
metaData.Key Information:
• Made from 100% real corn
• 30% less oil than potato chips
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.description: FAIRPRICE POTATO CHIPS - ORIGINAL JUMBO PACK 165G

metaData.Key Information: Made from 100% fresh potatoes and sprinkled with a tinge of salt, Fairprice original flavour potato chips are so crispy and irresistible that one is never enough! This product suitable for vegetarian diet.
metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE POTATO CHIPS - ORIGINAL JUMBO PACK 165G

product.name: FairPrice Potato Chips - Original

metaData.Key Information: The salted classic, thicker, sturdier potato chips with Ruffles trademarked ridges.
• Calbee has enhanced the flavour of the seas in these potato chips with an extra topping of seaweed flakes

metaData.Ingredients: Seaweed, Canola Oil, Sesame Oil, Salt
metaData.Key Information:
• Contains vitamin and minerals
• Suitable for both adult and kids

product.name: CJ Bibigo Crispy Seaweed Snack - Sesame

metaData.Ingredients: Seaweed 85%, Palm Oil 9%, Pepper 2%, Chili 2%, Salt 1.5%, Flavour Enhancer (E627, E631) 0.5%
metaData.Key Information:
• Packed full of goodness and delicious nutrients from the sea
• Manufactured with the most start of the art of technology to ensure highest standards and hygiene
• Consumed as a snack or an as addition to your meals
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store in a cool and dry place
• Avoid direct sunlight and high temperature

product.name: Tao Kae Noi Crispy Seaweed - Hot & Spicy

metaData.Ingredients: Dried Potato, Vegetable Oil (Palm Olein), Wheat Starch, Rice Flour, Emulsifier (Vegetable Origin), Maltodextrin, Salt, Dextrose, Citric Acid
metaData.Key Information:
• Bursting with flavour
• No artificial colours
